payload.answer: Compiled durable memories for Sam: current employment at Point72 after leaving Goldman last month, music preferences around Bill Evans and early Coltrane, and interest in discussing AI infrastructure with Daniele.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity IDs were provided; entities are referenced by names only.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is no longer at Goldman; Sam said they left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is interested in catching up with Daniele about AI infrastructure and asked Daniele to send an article on the topic.

details: Committed Sam's employment update without preserving Goldman as current.
Committed Sam's AI infrastructure discussion interest with medium confidence because the exact article/topic details are unspecified.
